verses.text: David in a lungsim sungah, “Saul' khut tawh ni khat ni ciangin ka si theikha ding hi. Kei-a' dingin Filistia-te' gamah tai ding sangin a hoihzaw dang omlo hi. Tua hi leh Saul in Israel gamgi huamsungah kei hong zon' niloh lungkia ta ding a, ama khutsung panin ka suakta ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin David kithawi a, amah tawh a om mihing za gukte tawh Gath kumpipa, Maok' tapa Akhish kiangah a pai hi

Tua ciangin David, a innkuanpihte leh a mite a innkuanpih ciat tawh, David zong a zi nihte, Jezreel khuami Ahinoam leh Nabal' zi meigongnu, Karmel khuami Abigail tawh, Gath-a Akhish kiangah va teng hi
Gath-ah David tai hi, ci-in Saul kiangah a kigen ciangin amah in David zong nawnlo hi

Tua ciangin David in Akhish kiangah, “Nong hehpih zawh leh, ka ten' theihna dingin gamsung khuate khatah kei-a' ding mun hong pia in; bang hangin na nasempa nang tawh kumpi khuasungah tengkhawm ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Akhish in tua ni-in ama tungah Ziklag khua a pia hi. Tua ahih manin tuni dongin tua khua pen Judah kumpite-a' ahi hi
Filistia gamsungah David a ten' hunsung pen kum khat leh kha li sung ahi hi
Tu-in David leh a mite paito-in Geshur mite, Girzi mite, leh Amalek mite va sim hi; bang hang hiam cih leh hih mite pen Egypt lam Shur ciangdongah tanglai-a kipanin a teng mite ahi uh hi
Tua ciangin David in tua gam vatgawp a, numei ahi a, pasal ahi zongin hingkhawi loin, ahih hangin tuute, bawngtalte, late, kalaohte, leh puante la-in Akhish kiangah hong ciahkik hi
Akhish in, “Tuni-in kua va sim na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin David in, “Judah mite' Negeb gam,” ahih kei leh, “Jerahmeel mite' Negeb gam,” ahih kei leh, “Ken mite' Negeb gam,” a ci hi

David in, “Amaute in kote' thu genin, ‘David in tua bangin hih hi,’ ci ding uh ahih ciangin,” ci-in ngaihsun ahih manin Gath-ah thu a puak thei ding numei ahi a, pasal ahi zongin hingkhawilo hi. Filistia-te' gamsungah a ten' sungteng tua bang gamtatna pen ama ngeina ahi hi
Akhish in David muangin, “Ama mipih Israel-te in a muhdah theihna dingin amahmah kibawl khin hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah ka nasem hi tawntung ding hi,” ci-in a ngaihsun hi.
